title: Single-cell RNA sequencing highlights intratumor heterogeneity and intercellular network featured in adamantinomatous craniopharyngioma
author: Yu Jiang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This code is used to reproduce the conclusion of the article titled "Single-cell RNA sequencing highlights intratumor heterogeneity and intercellular network featured in adamantinomatous craniopharyngioma". 

 This project also contains single-cell RNA sequencing data for ACP1-3.
